title: evonymopsis acutifolia
intro: Evonymopsis acutifolia, also known as the Mountain Pepper, is a plant species native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used by the indigenous Māori people for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to improve respiratory issues and boost the immune system. Evonymopsis acutifolia is often prepared as a tincture, infusion, or ointment, which can be used topically or ingested under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
